title: A Lava Chicken Mod
description: a mod to add Steve's lava chicken from "A Minecraft Movie" into java edition
body:
The Mod that adds La-la-la-lava, ch-ch-ch-chicken
Steve's Lava Chicken, yeah, it's tasty as hell
Ooh, mamacita, now you're ringin' the bell
Crispy and juicy, now you're havin' a snack
Ooh, super spicy, it's a lava attack TO minecraft using special code things to add it
